name: HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_VL
query: SELECT hao.ORGANIZATION_ID, hao.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, hao.COST_ALLOCATION_KEYFLEX_ID, hao.LOCATION_ID, hao.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, haotl.NAME, hao.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, hao.INTERNAL_EXTERNAL_FLAG, hao.INTERNAL_ADDRESS_LINE, hao.TYPE, hao.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, hao.ATTRIBUTE1, hao.ATTRIBUTE2, hao.ATTRIBUTE3, hao.ATTRIBUTE4, hao.ATTRIBUTE5, hao.ATTRIBUTE6, hao.ATTRIBUTE7, hao.ATTRIBUTE8, hao.ATTRIBUTE9, hao.ATTRIBUTE10, hao.ATTRIBUTE11, hao.ATTRIBUTE12, hao.ATTRIBUTE13, hao.ATTRIBUTE14, hao.ATTRIBUTE15, hao.ATTRIBUTE16, hao.ATTRIBUTE17, hao.ATTRIBUTE18, hao.ATTRIBUTE19, hao.ATTRIBUTE20, hao.ATTRIBUTE21, hao.ATTRIBUTE22, hao.ATTRIBUTE23, hao.ATTRIBUTE24, hao.ATTRIBUTE25, hao.ATTRIBUTE26, hao.ATTRIBUTE27, hao.ATTRIBUTE28, hao.ATTRIBUTE29, hao.ATTRIBUTE30, hao.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, hao.LAST_UPDATED_BY, hao.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, hao.CREATED_BY, hao.CREATION_DATE, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, hao.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, hao.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15, hao.ORGANIZATION_CODE FROM HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F hao, HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F_TL haotl WHERE hao.ORGANIZATION_ID = haotl.ORGANIZATION_ID AND hao.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = haotl.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND hao.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = haotl.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND haotl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('lang') AND TRUNC(sysdate) BETWEEN hao.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND hao.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
